accessNotes.en: Dimotiki meleti monopation perigrafei prosvasi pros ti Salaora meso chomatodromon anamesa stis limnothalasses kai ton Amvrakiko.
accessNotes.gr: Δημοτική μελέτη μονοπατιών περιγράφει πρόσβαση προς τη Σαλαώρα μέσω χωματόδρομων ανάμεσα στις λιμνοθάλασσες και τον Αμβρακικό.

waterDepth.label: Ρηχά νερά
waterDepth.notes: Η είσοδος στη θάλασσα είναι πιο ήπια και το βάθος αυξάνει πιο σταδιακά.

sourceNotes: Low-confidence follow-up 2026-05-28: Arta municipality documents accessibility ramps at Salaora/Koronisia beaches, a 2026 public-use concession for a canteen at Avleri/Salaora, and trail access through dirt-road lagoon routes. Promoted to medium for identity/access/seasonal-service context; wind, live sea-state and coordinates were not changed.

High-confidence Arta follow-up 2026-06-02: Arta municipality sources directly support Salaora identity, seasonal accessibility ramp placement, seasonal canteen/public-use context, and access through Koronisia/Salaora dirt-road lagoon routes. This remains static access/service evidence only; no windProfile, scoring, live calm/protected/safe, or ideal-beach claim was changed.

accessNotes.en: Dimotiki meleti monopation anaferei oti i diadromi apo Koronisia pros Paralia Frachtis kineitai se chomatodromo dipla sti limnothalassa.

metadata.sourceNotes: Low-confidence follow-up 2026-05-28: Arta municipality directly documents Fraktis beach at Koronisia with seasonal accessibility ramps, canteen and sunbed/umbrella concession areas, plus dirt-road lagoon access in the municipal trail study. Promoted to medium for identity/access/seasonal-service context; wind, live sea-state and coordinates were not changed.
